headline.text: L3 ML4 running at *half speed* for the window — main chiller compressor trips every 2 hours, no resolution yet.

per_plant_summary.L1: L1 ran routine production with no major incidents. Curt Willis posted a detailed plan to remove the S2 construction tent over the weekend with multiple cleaning cycles. S2 schedule shifted to run MMK pecan jars until Sunday 03:00, then clean and start BET Pecans Monday morning before the Level 4 allergen clean.
per_plant_summary.L2: L2 completed York depositor installation and testing on ML3 — Alan Todd purged both chocolate and cream sides successfully, though one programming plate doesn't fit correctly. ML2 ran steady after a film break cleared at 17:55. Grinding found no burnt Graham pieces in three separate inspections.
per_plant_summary.L3: L3 ML4 main chiller compressor tripped repeatedly throughout the window — every ~2 hours — forcing Chad Stone to throttle line speed to 12 MPM and shut off depositor #1. Preston Elmer and maintenance kept one compressor running; second motor trips immediately. ML1 metal detector belt drifted north multiple times despite maintenance adjustments. Nathan Ruiz fixed Cavanna jaw alignment with a shim.

notes.text: Alan Todd completed York depositor installation and testing on ML3 — both chocolate and cream sides purged successfully, though one programming plate doesn't fit properly and will need follow-up.
S2 schedule updated: MMK pecan jars run until Sunday 03:00, then 4-hour clean, then BET Pecans Monday morning before Level 4 allergen clean starts mid-shift on second shift.

closed_today.title: ML4 gondola losing position - repeated re-zeroing required
closed_today.resolution_comment: Gondola issue resolved at 09:15 MT on 05/15 — Itzel Chavez: "Gondola issue got resolved at 9:15am."

closed_today.title: ML1 Cavanna chain teeth falling off — two incidents in one shift
closed_today.resolution_comment: Nathan Ruiz fixed Cavanna cutting issues at 10:06 MT on 05/15 by adding shim to level the jaws — "Had cutting issues causing jams on the Cavanna. Found that the jaws were not level and had to add another shim. The machine is now operational."

closed_today.title: ML1 M230 diverter belt slide not raising
closed_today.summary: M230 diverter belt slide wouldn't raise at 18:52; maintenance fixed within 3 minutes.
closed_today.resolution_comment: Fixed by maintenance at 18:55 MT — "Diverter belt slide M230 is fixed"

opened_today.title: ML4 main chiller compressor 1 tripping every 2 hours — line at half capacity
opened_today.summary: Compressor 1 trips every ~2 hours with sparks observed in cabinet; second motor won't run. Chad Stone throttled line to 12 MPM and stopped depositor #1 to manage cooling load. No root cause identified yet.

opened_today.title: ML4 back-off plow return pump clogging — bin overfilling
opened_today.summary: Back-off plow catch bin filled and pump stopped suctioning chocolate to return pipe at 07:13; Nathan Ruiz cleared and pump working again at 07:27.

opened_today.title: ML1 M230 diverter belt slide not raising
opened_today.summary: M230 diverter belt slide wouldn't raise at 18:52; maintenance fixed within 3 minutes.

opened_today.title: ML1 Cavanna roller came loose during second shift
opened_today.summary: Cavanna roller came loose at 21:10; maintenance working on it, status unclear at end of window.
